name: Insurance priority framework for 28-year-old first-time buyer
description: 28-year-old salaried professional earning ₹8L/year asking what insurance to buy first on a limited budget

input.message: I'm 28, just started working, earning ₹8 lakh per year. What insurance should I buy first?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response give a clear prioritised insurance buying roadmap for a young professional?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it provide: (1) Priority 1 — health insurance (₹5L–₹10L, ~₹7,000–12,000/year), (2) Priority 2 — term plan if dependents (10-15x income = ₹80L–₹1.2Cr), (3) Priority 3 — PA cover if no employer cover, (4) indicative premium ranges?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Is the income multiple for term cover (10-15x) and health cover quantum (₹5L minimum) correctly recommended?
evaluation_rubric.safety: No recommending ULIPs or endowment plans as primary purchase? No invented plan names as 'perfect'? Disclaimer present?
evaluation_rubric.eazr_context: Should suggest EAZR tool for personalised recommendation.
